column5: MFA is optional for all staff, so a phished or reused password on a privileged account gives an attacker direct access to production and customer data.
column8: The gap is about the strength of authentication required before access is granted; PR.AA-03 covers authenticating users commensurate with risk and A.8.5 covers secure authentication requirements.
column9: Entra ID Conditional Access policy export showing phishing-resistant MFA enforced for all privileged roles; OPA decision for each privileged identity in compliance-report.json
